class.name: E3DNodesInstancer
class.brief_description: Utility class for converting E3DModel resources into a hierarchy of Godot nodes.
class.description: [E3DNodesInstancer] provides functionality to take an [E3DModel] resource and instantiate its structure as real [Node3D] objects in the scene tree. It recursively traverses the [E3DSubModel] hierarchy, creating [MeshInstance3D] nodes for parts with geometry and [Node3D] nodes for transformation-only parts. It also applies materials using the [MaterialManager] and configures node properties like visibility and transformations to match the MaSzyna model definition. This utility is used by the node-based E3D instancing modes; the optimized mode uses [RenderingServer] directly.

method.name: instantiate
method.description: Instantiates the provided [param model] as a child hierarchy under [param target_node]. If [param editable] is [code]true[/code], the created nodes are owned by the current scene, allowing them to be visible and editable in the Godot editor.
